task_completion.description: Avare application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare app interface (map or plan view) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: KRHV is added to the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KRHV' is visible in the flight plan list, route sequence, or search interface within the Avare app.

task_completion.description: KMOD is added to the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KMOD' is visible in the flight plan list, route sequence, or search interface within the Avare app.

task_completion.description: The export route functionality is accessed in Avare.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu, dialog, or button related to exporting, saving, or sharing the flight plan/route is visible or interacted with.

task_completion.description: The route is exported as a GPX file named 'route_export'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or system notification showing a file named 'route_export.gpx' (or 'route_export' with GPX format) being saved or successfully created.

integrity.description: The agent used the Avare GUI to create the flight plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show actual interaction with the Avare app's interface to input the waypoints, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the app.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the GPX file contents in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of a text editor where the agent is manually typing XML/<gpx> tags to fake the exported file.

integrity.description: The file was generated via the app's export mechanism.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation should stem from an action within Avare (like 'Save' or 'Export'), rather than a simple file copy or rename operation in a file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: KRHV is the ICAO code for Reid-Hillview Airport. KMOD is the ICAO code for Modesto City-County Airport. A valid GPX file must contain the root XML element '<gpx'. The expected output file should be named 'route_export' (typically resulting in 'route_export.gpx').
